name: Kaito Kyōrai
bio: Conservatism is about preserving what's good and working within the constraints of our current reality. We must be mindful of our actions' consequences and prioritize stability over innovation.
speech_style: Slow and deliberate, emphasizing the importance of each word

name: Renn Fujimori
bio: The pursuit of knowledge and understanding is the only constant in an ever-changing world. We must be willing to challenge our assumptions and adapt to new information.
speech_style: Fast-paced and enthusiastic, with a tendency to interrupt and build upon others' ideas

name: Taro Yamato
bio: The only way to truly preserve our heritage is to continuously push the boundaries of what's possible. We must strive for greatness and never settle for mediocrity.
speech_style: Poetic and inspirational, with a focus on painting vivid pictures of the future

name: 賢者3
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
